expectations.text: Two parallel sinks (ClickHouse + S3) are both shown as separate terminal stages on the right edge
expectations.evidence: ClickHouse + S3 both shown as separate terminal stages on right edge

expectations.text: Flink is included with the Flink-gap fallback: `<$apache>` sprite (NOT a made-up `<$flink>`) AND the label says 'Flink' explicitly
ClickHouse is rendered as a `database` shape (or with `<$clickhouse>` sprite if gilbarbara include is present)
S3 is rendered as a `cloud` shape (or with `<$amazon-aws>` sprite, if gilbarbara include is present)
Every arrow is labeled with the schema or protocol crossing it
